'''Dendis Dobo''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] merchant encountered by [[Meetra Surik]] on [[Citadel Station]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Telos IV]]. Dendis co-owned the [[Dobo Brothers' Emporium]] with his brother, [[Samhan Dobo|Samhan]]; the two shared a module but often disagreed over the ethics of their business. Dendis preferred not to sell weapons and was doing only fully legal business. He was so glad that Surik exposed his brother's corruption and black market dealings that he gave her a discount for helping [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dol Grenn]] and the [[Telos Security Force]] arrest Samhan.
